name: Spoofed DOT inspection pre-notice (fear + authority)
subject: DOT Roadside Inspection Pre-Notice — verify CDL details
trucking_context: Drivers respect DOT correspondence and fear OOS findings during inspections; pre-inspection emails are a known scam vector targeting drivers' CDL and medical-card data.
indicators: Real DOT does not pre-warn drivers of roadside inspections — that defeats the point of a roadside inspection
Sender domain us-dot-inspection.net is not on dot.gov
Asks for CDL number / endorsements via a generic web form
Pressure framing ('avoid OOS finding') is a classic phish tactic
